
```{r create_table_cmdline, results='asis', include=TRUE,echo=FALSE,message=FALSE}


if ( nrow(data) >0 ) {

cat("\n**Command Line Usage by Educational Category**\n\n")

# Prepare data with education category
cmd_filtered <- data |>
  filter(Finished == TRUE) |>
  mutate(
    EduCat = ifelse(Degree == "Other", "Other", "Academic"),
    `Command line used often` = str_detect(`Advanced_usage_1`,fixed("Often")),
    `Command line used once`  = str_detect(`Advanced_usage_1`,fixed("Once")),
    `System with >6 CPUs: often` = str_detect(`Advanced_usage_4`,fixed("Often")),
    `System with >6 CPUs: once`  = str_detect(`Advanced_usage_4`,fixed("Once"))
  ) |>
  select(EduCat, `Command line used often`, `Command line used once`, `System with >6 CPUs: often`, `System with >6 CPUs: once`)

# Pivot longer for features
cmd_long <- cmd_filtered |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -EduCat,
    names_to = "Feature",
    values_to = "Used"
  ) |>
  filter(Used == TRUE)

# Totals for each group
cmd_totals <- cmd_filtered |>
  group_by(EduCat) |>
  summarise(Total = n(), .groups = "drop")

overall_total <- nrow(cmd_filtered)

# Tabulate by group
cmd_tab <- cmd_long |>
  group_by(EduCat, Feature) |>
  summarise(Frequency = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  left_join(cmd_totals, by = "EduCat") |>
  mutate(Percent = Frequency / Total * 100)


# Pivot wider for Academic/Other columns
cmd_wide <- cmd_tab |>
  select(Feature, EduCat, Percent) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = EduCat,
    values_from = Percent,
    values_fill = 0
  )

# Ensure both Academic and Other columns exist
if (!"Academic" %in% names(cmd_wide)) cmd_wide$Academic <- 0
if (!"Other" %in% names(cmd_wide)) cmd_wide$Other <- 0

# Overall percentages
overall_tab <- cmd_long |>
  group_by(Feature) |>
  summarise(Frequency = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(Overall = Frequency / overall_total * 100) |>
  select(Feature, Overall)

# Merge overall into wide table
final_tab <- cmd_wide |>
  left_join(overall_tab, by = "Feature") |>
  select(Feature, Academic, Other, Overall) |>
  mutate(
    Academic = sprintf("%.1f%%", Academic),
    Other = sprintf("%.1f%%", Other),
    Overall = sprintf("%.1f%%", Overall)
  )

final_tab |>
  kable() |>
  footnote(general = "Completed responses only. Cells show percent of feature mentions by group.")

} else {
  cat("No data yet. Check back later.")
}

```
